title: Monoint
description: A font pack, which the name is pronounced "Mano-int" containing the typefact that you have been trained to recognize since childhood, Also requires Caxton to work
body:
# Monoint

**WARNING** For some reason, the signs part is broken! Please disregard the sign issue and use it like normal because I am a developer, not a bug-fixer!

A Texture Pack (which is pronounced "Mano-int") for JE with Caxton mod installed.

The one Texture Pack that brings the typeface you've been trained to recognize since childhood to minecraft!

Screenshots:

![Pause Menu Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3372b11a4ed40d7cc0cfbf3d63edfb77d6f23a5_0.webp)

![Normal Text Format Demonstration in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cce9640ec75eb8a14270a927f9638b7e891743b_0.webp)

![Bold Text Format Demonstration in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc117c7093b5412e6e4a4e5d99fcb563ab389fa5_0.webp)
